entries.label: Auth (Frontegg)
entries.reason: B2B SaaS identity platform — blocking breaks user login, SSO, and org management on any app using Frontegg.

entries.label: Auth (Frontegg CDN)
entries.reason: Frontegg JS SDK and auth UI assets — blocking prevents login UI from rendering.

entries.label: Auth (Descope)
entries.reason: No-code auth platform with passkeys/magic links — blocking breaks login flows on apps using Descope.

entries.label: Auth (PropelAuth)
entries.reason: B2B authentication platform — auth.propelauth.com hosts the login UI; blocking breaks sign-in for any app using it.

entries.label: Auth (Hanko Cloud)
entries.reason: Hanko Cloud API endpoint — blocking breaks passkey/WebAuthn login on apps using Hanko Cloud.

entries.label: Auth (Hanko Passkey API)
entries.reason: Hanko Passkey API endpoint — blocking breaks passkey authentication for apps using Hanko Passkey API.

entries.label: Auth (Corbado)
entries.reason: Passkey-first auth platform — blocking breaks login flows on apps using Corbado Complete or Connect.

entries.label: Payments (Lemon Squeezy JS)
entries.reason: Lemon Squeezy checkout overlay JS — blocking prevents the purchase modal from loading on any Lemon Squeezy store.

entries.label: Payments (Lemon Squeezy assets)
entries.reason: Lemon Squeezy checkout assets CDN — blocking breaks checkout UI rendering.

entries.label: Payments (Lemon Squeezy)
entries.reason: Lemon Squeezy payment platform widely used by indie developers — blocking breaks checkout completely.

entries.label: Payments (Checkout.com JS)
entries.reason: Checkout.com Frames JS library — blocking breaks card payment forms on e-commerce sites using Checkout.com.

entries.label: Payments (Checkout.com CDN)
entries.reason: Checkout.com assets CDN — blocking prevents payment forms and checkout UI from loading.

entries.label: Payments (Checkout.com)
entries.reason: Major global payment processor used by enterprise merchants — blocking breaks all payment flows.

entries.label: Payments (Spreedly)
entries.reason: Spreedly payment orchestration iframe endpoint — blocking breaks card tokenization on sites using Spreedly.

entries.label: Payments (Spreedly)
entries.reason: Spreedly payment orchestration platform — blocking breaks hosted payment forms.

entries.label: Payments (Primer SDK)
entries.reason: Primer payment orchestration SDK — blocking prevents checkout UI from loading on sites using Primer.

entries.label: Payments (Primer)
entries.reason: Primer payment orchestration platform — blocking breaks payment flows for apps using Primer.

entries.label: Feature Flags (DevCycle CDN)
entries.reason: DevCycle JS SDK CDN endpoint (js.devcycle.com/devcycle.min.js) — blocking silently disables feature flags causing missing UI or broken flows.

entries.label: Feature Flags (DevCycle API)
entries.reason: DevCycle server-side bucketing API — blocking disables server SDK feature flag evaluation.

entries.label: Feature Flags (DevCycle)
entries.reason: DevCycle feature flag platform — blocking breaks any feature flag evaluation, causing apps to fall back to defaults silently.

entries.label: Feature Flags (Hypertune Edge)
entries.reason: Hypertune GraphQL edge endpoint for feature flags — blocking causes flag evaluation to fail or fall back to defaults.

entries.label: Feature Flags (Hypertune)
entries.reason: Hypertune type-safe feature flag platform — blocking breaks feature flag evaluation in apps using it.

entries.label: CAPTCHA (Geetest)
entries.reason: Geetest CAPTCHA (v3/v4) used widely in Asian-market apps and global SaaS — blocking breaks login, signup, and form submissions.

entries.label: CAPTCHA (Geetest API)
entries.reason: Geetest CAPTCHA verification API — blocking prevents challenge completion, breaking login and form flows.

entries.label: CAPTCHA (MTCaptcha)
entries.reason: MTCaptcha GDPR-compliant CAPTCHA service endpoint — blocking breaks form submissions and login on sites using it.

entries.label: Video (Kaltura CDN API)
entries.reason: Kaltura video platform CDN API — widely used in education and enterprise; blocking breaks video playback entirely.

entries.label: Video (Kaltura)
entries.reason: Kaltura enterprise video platform (major in education/LMS) — blocking breaks video players and media delivery.

entries.label: Video (SproutVideo CDN)
entries.reason: SproutVideo marketing video platform CDN — blocking breaks embedded video players on business websites.
